headline: Production agent infrastructure consolidated around the Model Context Protocol this quarter as model routing led the rotation among techniques.
body: Model routing topped the movers at a 145 ratio, though it weakened, while a cluster of caching and tooling techniques (prompt caching, cache hit rate, tool integration, context window) lagged behind it. The window's center of gravity was production agent tooling: multiple tutorials built multi-agent systems on MCP with LangGraph, PostgreSQL memory, and external data connectors ([1], [3], [8]), and Databricks laid out a five-pillar enterprise framework spanning evaluation, observability, tracing, and governance that caught 47 PII breaches before launch ([2]). New entrants including trace analysis, layerwise intent probing, KV cache editing, and rubric-based rewards surfaced as fresh technique directions. On the organizational side, the head of product for Meta's 'AI for work' transformation is departing ([9]).
